message:
🐛 Broaden pod issue detection to catch more failure modes (#301)

The FindPodIssues function only caught 3 waiting reasons
(CrashLoopBackOff, ImagePullBackOff, ErrImagePull), OOMKilled,
restarts >5, and Pending/Failed phases. This missed many common
issues that users expect to see.

Now detects:
- Init container failures (waiting, terminated with non-zero exit)
- More waiting reasons: CreateContainerConfigError, RunContainerError,
  InvalidImageName, CreateContainerError, PostStartHookError
- Non-zero exit codes on terminated containers
- Containers running but not ready for >5 minutes (probe failures)
- Pod scheduling failures (Unschedulable condition)
- Pods stuck in Pending for >2 minutes
- Failed pods with specific reason (e.g. Evicted)
- Pods stuck in Terminating for >5 minutes
- Effective status now mirrors kubectl logic instead of raw phase

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
